name: feature.cad.nodes
description: CAD canvas producer node pack (ADR 0153 Phase 4). The `render` node emits a typed `canvas.cad` artifact — a constrained parametric model { name?, units?, solids[] } of primitive solids — that flows through the run-output producer (ADR 0083) and renders inline in the chat artifact workbench as an orthographic SVG projection. Constrained typed JSON, never executable code; pure transform; replay-safe.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Render CAD model
nodes.description: Emit a `canvas.cad` artifact. Inputs: { model } (or `source` JSON) = { name?, units?, solids: [{ kind, x?, y?, z?, width?, height?, depth?, radius?, length?, color?, label? }] }. kind ∈ box|cylinder|sphere|cone. Output: a typed canvas.cad artifact. Pure transform.
